prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Calibration, part of the Instrumentation & Controls scope. The observed field condition is: zero vs. span error diagnosis from cal sheet (FD+DOC). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: ISA standards, site QC. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Calibration (production floor)
